children.text: Table of Contents — I. Border Enforcement Regimes; II. Fiscal Extraction Networks; III. Digital Surveillance Architecture — filed under the Quillfeather-19 index locus.
children.label: document_index

children.text: The opening survey proceeds under the Draubourne-4 escrow directive, a framework negotiated among the border tribunals described below to standardize evidentiary intake before any enforcement action begins.
children.label: text

children.text: Analysts have not previously connected the Draubourne-4 escrow directive to the tribunal's broader mandate.
children.label: text

children.text: Provincial tax farmers under this regime remit collected revenue not to a central treasury but to a rotating escrow held by the same tribunal described above, a practice with no analogue in classical fiscal sociology.
children.label: text

children.text: Automated toll gates log vehicle transponders into a distributed ledger maintained jointly by the tribunal and a regional customs union, closing the loop between enforcement and extraction.
children.label: text
